item.title: About
item.description: I’m a 23-years-old CE student at Universidad de Guadalajara 🎓🎺, diving deep into cybersecurity and pentesting. 🔏🧪 My name is Manuel Balderas, but most of my friends call me Mane 👋. I’m currently in my final semester of Computer Engineer, and I am deeply passionate about cybersecurity 👾. Although I’m still in the early stages of my ethical hacker journey 🕵️‍♂️, I’m constantly learning and improving my skills, and I’m excited to share my experiences here.
